data.title: 国际服活动「Summer Sky's Promise」事前登录奖励
data.summary: Sensei, we're here to let you know about the special pre-registration rewards for Summer Sky’s Promi
data.body:
Sensei, we're here to let you know about the special pre-registration rewards for Summer Sky’s Promise! ✨

Log in to the game during the period below to receive your pre-registration rewards and enjoy the Summer Sky’s Promise event, too~!

➡️Details: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3028&thread=3303923

#BlueArchive
